summary: Plan-only assessment for five open PRs. No merge actions are recommended because none has complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof. #90490 has a concrete contributor-branch repair path; #90503, #90514, #90517, and #90547 need maintainer/Codex-review finalization before merge.
